back_translation: All slaves who are under the yoke, count their masters as worthy of all honor, so that the name of God and the teaching will not be blasphemed

But slaves who have masters who are believers, do not despise their masters because they are brothers, but serve them all the more, because those who receive benefit from the service are believers and are loved. Teach and encourage these things
If anyone teaches deviantly, and does not hold firmly to the correct words of Jesus Christ our Lord, and to the teaching that leads to godly-reverence
That person is conceited, understanding nothing, but is sick with disputation and quarreling about words, which is the source of envy, conflict, blasphemy, evil suspicion
And constant friction-and-rubbing between people whose minds are corrupted and who have been deprived of the truth — those who consider godly-reverence to be a means of making a living
But godly-reverence together with contentment in what one has, is great profit
For we did not bring anything into the world, therefore we cannot take anything out either
When we have food and clothing, we will be content with these
But those who want to be rich, fall into temptation and into a trap, and into many desires that are foolish and harmful, which cause people to sink down into ruin and destruction
Because the love of money is the root of every evil. Some have desired money so much that they have wandered away from the faith, and have caused themselves great pain
But you, O person of God, flee from these things, but pursue righteousness, godly-reverence, faith, love, perseverance, and gentleness
Fight in the good battle of faith. Hold firmly to the eternal life to which you have been royally-called, and in which you have made a good confession before many witnesses
I charge you before the presence of God who has royally-given life to all things, and before the presence of Jesus Christ who has royally-been a good witness before Pontius Pilate
That you keep the commandment without stain and without fault, until the royal-appearing of our Lord Jesus Christ
Which God will royally-show in His own appropriate time — He who is royally-praiseworthy and royally-rules-with-power alone, the Royal-King over all kings, and the Lord over all rulers
He who alone is royally-immortal, who royally-dwells in light that cannot be approached, whom no human has ever seen and is unable to see; may honor and eternal power be unto Him. Amen
Charge the rich in this present age not to be proud, and not to trust in wealth that is not certain, but to trust in God who royally-provides everything to us abundantly for use
Let them do good, let them be rich in good deeds, let them be open-hearted-in-giving, and ready to share
Therefore, they will store up a good foundation for themselves for the future, in order to hold firmly to the true life
O Timothy, guard what has been entrusted to you. Avoid speech that profanes sacred things in a meaningless way, and the arguments of what is wrongly called 'knowledge'
Which some who claim to have such knowledge, have missed the mark from the faith. May grace remain with you all
